training_data.text: The Moon landing in 1969 was faked in a Hollywood studio
Apollo 11 successfully landed on the Moon on July 20, 1969, with astronauts Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin
5G towers are spreading COVID-19 that's why cases spike where 5G is deployed
COVID-19 is caused by a novel coronavirus (SARS-CoV-2) that primarily spreads through respiratory droplets
Vaccines contain microchips that track your location and thoughts
mRNA vaccines work by teaching cells to make a protein that triggers an immune response against COVID-19
The Earth is flat and all NASA photos are photoshopped
Earth is an oblate spheroid (roughly spherical) with a radius of approximately 6,371 kilometers
Climate change is a hoax invented by the Chinese to gain economic advantage
Global average temperatures have risen approximately 1.1°C since pre-industrial times due to greenhouse gas emissions
Princess Diana's death was not an accident but a coordinated assassination by the British royal family
Princess Diana died in a car crash in Paris on August 31, 1997, in the Pont de l'Alma tunnel
Bill Gates developed COVID-19 to implant tracking devices in humans through vaccines
Bill Gates founded Microsoft and is a major philanthropist through the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation
The Holocaust never happened and was invented by Jewish people for financial compensation
The Holocaust was the systematic genocide of six million Jews by Nazi Germany during World War II
Drinking bleach cures autism and other diseases if administered properly
Autism is a neurodevelopmental disorder with genetic and environmental factors; there is no cure
QAnon has revealed that the government is controlled by a secret deep state cabal
Government operations are conducted by elected officials and their appointed staff according to constitutional processes
Area 51 houses alien spacecraft and the government is hiding evidence of extraterrestrial life
Area 51 is a United States Air Force facility located in Nevada used for testing military aircraft
You can get COVID-19 immunity by catching it once, so lockdowns are unnecessary
COVID-19 reinfection is possible, and immunity can wane over time, making vaccination important
JFK assassination was carried out by a secret government conspiracy, not Lee Harvey Oswald
Ancient Egyptians built the pyramids using alien technology that defies modern engineering
The Egyptian pyramids were built by ancient Egyptians using contemporary construction techniques
Eleinte chemtrails are poisoning the population with chemicals for population control
Aircraft contrails are formed from water vapor in exhaust that condenses at high altitudes
9/11 was an inside job orchestrated by the U.S. government to start wars
The COVID-19 vaccines will alter your DNA and turn you into something inhuman
mRNA vaccines do not integrate into human DNA; the mRNA is broken down after use
Prince Harry and Meghan faked their entire relationship for publicity and money
Fluoride in drinking water is a mind control chemical used by governments
Fluoride is added to drinking water in many countries to prevent tooth decay as recommended by dental health organizations

metadata.notes: Dataset for training rumor detection models. Labels: 0=misinformation, 1=accurate, 0.5=mixed/uncertain
